_comment: Lane ids are stable names for changes/<id>/. The Windows WebGPU lane's engine patches live under webkit/patches/windows/ (webkit/patches/<os>/ is always applied), so the `enabled` flag here is a status indicator that the lane is in active development — builders and dashboards key on it, not the patch apply order. Flip back to false only to mute the lane in status reports, not to disable the patches.
